h1. Architecture Decision Log

h2. ADR Index

|| ADR || Decision || Status ||
| ADR-001 | MongoDB remains authoritative source of metadata | Proposed |
| ADR-002 | Vector and graph stores are derived projections | Proposed |
| ADR-003 | JRN is the stable relationship identity key | Proposed |
| ADR-004 | MVP entity scope | Proposed |
| ADR-005 | MongoDB Atlas Vector Search as initial vector store | Proposed |
| ADR-006 | Neo4j as graph projection for lineage and impact analysis | Proposed |
| ADR-007 | AI chunks use deterministic chunk IDs | Proposed |
| ADR-008 | Security filters are applied before LLM context assembly | Proposed |
| ADR-009 | Raw event records are summarized before vectorization | Proposed |
| ADR-010 | AI enrichment suggestions require human approval | Proposed |

h2. ADR Template

{code}
h1. ADR-###: <Decision Title>

h2. Status

Proposed / Accepted / Superseded

h2. Context

What problem are we solving?

h2. Options Considered

# Option A
# Option B
# Option C

h2. Decision

What did we choose?

h2. Rationale

Why?

h2. Consequences

What tradeoffs or follow-up work does this create?

h2. Related Jira

* DC-AI-###
{code}

h2. Initial ADR Drafts

h3. ADR-001: MongoDB remains authoritative source of metadata

*Status:* Proposed

*Decision:* MongoDB remains the source of truth for Data Compass metadata. Vector indexes and Neo4j are derived projections.

*Rationale:* The Data Compass metadata model already resides in MongoDB and contains the authoritative entity records and relationships.

h3. ADR-002: Vector and graph stores are derived projections

*Status:* Proposed

*Decision:* MongoDB Vector Search and Neo4j are rebuildable projections generated from canonical metadata.

*Rationale:* This avoids conflicting sources of truth and enables deterministic rebuilds.

h3. ADR-003: JRN is the stable relationship identity key

*Status:* Proposed

*Decision:* All AI chunks and graph nodes will include source JRN. Graph node uniqueness should be based on JRN where available.

*Rationale:* The Data Compass model uses JRN as the cross-entity relationship key.
